DP.444.0001:
Are you going to take Route 214?
You’re serious, aren’t you?\f
It’s too badly chewed up, and
there’s nothing to see there.\f
Well, I guess there is that Ruin
Maniac guy you could check out.\f
That guy’s been digging his way
through the bedrock all by himself.
DP.444.0002:
That Ruin Maniac! It takes effort and
dedication to do what he did!
